scripts.wasm:ensure-rust: which rustup || (unset RUSTUP_VERSION && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable && . $HOME/.cargo/env && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown)
scripts.stamp:sw: node -e "const f=require('fs'),p='dist/sw.js',d=new Date(Date.now()+9*36e5).toISOString().slice(0,10),s=f.readFileSync('src/lib/encodeWebmAlphaWasm.ts','utf-8'),m=s.match(/FFMPEG_CORE_VERSION\s*=\s*'([^']+)'/);if(!m)throw new Error('FFMPEG_CORE_VERSION not found in encodeWebmAlphaWasm.ts');f.writeFileSync(p,f.readFileSync(p,'utf-8').replaceAll('__BUILD_DATE__',d).replaceAll('__FFMPEG_CORE_VERSION__',m[1]))"
scripts.build: npm run wasm:build && astro build && npm run stamp:sw
scripts.build:cf: npm run wasm:ensure-rust && . $HOME/.cargo/env 2>/dev/null; npm run wasm:install && npm run wasm:build && astro build && npm run stamp:sw
